sections.heading: Secs. 10-321w to 10-321cc. Commission established; membership. Duties and powers. Planning and implementation of activities; guiding principles. Meetings; public hearings; assistance from private and governmental entities. Records and reports. Director and staff. Appropriations and contributions.

body: Sections 10-321w to 10-321cc , inclusive, are repealed, effective April 3, 1996.
content.plainText: Sections 10-321w to 10-321cc , inclusive, are repealed, effective April 3, 1996.
